scripts.validate: node tools/validate-plugins.mjs marketplaces/work && node tools/validate-plugins.mjs marketplaces/home
scripts.evals: node tools/run-evals.mjs marketplaces/work && node tools/run-evals.mjs marketplaces/home
scripts.test: npm run validate && npm run evals && npm run test:tools && npm run test:servers
scripts.validate:strict: node tools/validate-plugins.mjs marketplaces/work --strict && node tools/validate-plugins.mjs marketplaces/home --strict
